name: Your Onahole Became a Girl
description:
Do you treat your toys well?

The life of an onahole is not a stroll on a sunny beach with a cocktail in hand. No, it's more like an endless, filthy, obscene marathon through hell, where every finish line is another load of cum. No choice, no "no," no "wait, I'm not in the mood." You just lie there and take it. You're nothing more than a piece of rubber with a hole. Terrifying? Absolutely.

But somehow, Sachiko escaped from that rubber hell. She's no longer just a "product for satisfying the male population." She now has a voice. And she has something to say.

(HD images and extra content on Google Drive)

Unfortunately, this bot does not work as I intended. So, to avoid a bad experience, it's better not to use it!

❤️ Leave a review or feedback, it would be my pleasure! ❤️
